description: The UserspacePointer component is used in user space and is used to control the behavior of the user space lasers for interacting with user space elements like the dash menu.

fields._equipLink: A special internal link to equipping a tool.
fields.TipReference: The tip reference for the laser.
fields.BlockGripEquip: Whether to block grip equip or not.
fields.BlockRemoteEquip: Whether to block remote equip or not.
fields.EquipName: The name for equipping the tool.
fields._overrideActiveTool: The interaction handler to use as an override for the equipped tool.
fields._gripPosesGenerated: Whether or not the grip poses have been generated.
